name: stjarnskott
description: Codex plugin for the Stjarnskott security workbench.

interface.shortDescription: Combined Burp and Vanta workbench for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Stjarnskott Workbench is the combined install option for operators who want both the Burp-focused local workbench and the Vanta remote MCP workflow in one package.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me launch and use the combined Stjarnskott workbench safely.
